de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<T extends AuxiliaryContract>

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<T>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - the type of AuxiliaryContract for which this class generated POs.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    Contract, SpecificationElement
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    FunctionalBlockContract, FunctionalLoopContract

    public abstract class FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
extends java.lang.Object
implements Contract
    This class is only used to generate a proof obligation for an AuxiliaryContract.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.Contract

        Contract.OriginalVariables

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.Contract

        INVALID_ID

      Returns the unique internal name of the specification element.

      Returns the contracted function symbol.
      java.lang.String getTypeName()
      Returns technical name for the contract type.
      VisibilityModifier getVisibility()
      Returns the visibility of the invariant (null for default visibility)
      boolean hasMby()
      Tells whether the contract contains a measured_by clause.
      boolean hasModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
      Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
      boolean hasSelfVar()
      Checks if a self variable is originally provided.
      int id()
      Returns the id number of the contract.
      boolean isAuxiliary() 
      java.lang.String proofToString(Services services)
      Returns a parseable String representation of the contract.

      boolean toBeSaved()
      Tells whether, on saving a proof where this contract is available, the contract should be saved too.

    • Method Detail

      • isAuxiliary

        public boolean isAuxiliary()
        Specified by:
        isAuxiliary in interface Contract
        Returns:
        true if any only if this contract does not necessarily need to be proven in its own proof obligation. E.g., this is true for FunctionalBlockContracts and FunctionalLoopContracts.

        public java.lang.String getName()
        Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
        Returns the unique internal name of the specification element.

        getKJT in interface SpecificationElement

      • id

        public int id()
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Returns the id number of the contract. If a contract has instances for several methods (inheritance!), all instances have the same id. The id is either non-negative or equal to INVALID_ID.
        Specified by:
        id in interface Contract

      • getTarget

        public IProgramMethod getTarget()
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Returns the contracted function symbol.
        Specified by:

      • getMby

        public Term getMby(ProgramVariable selfVar,
                   ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars,
                   Services services)
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Returns the measured_by clause of the contract.
        Specified by:
        getMby in interface Contract
        Parameters:
        selfVar - the self variable
        paramVars - the parameter variables
        services - services object
        Returns:
        the measured-by term

      • getMby

        public Term getMby(java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> heapTerms,
                   Term selfTerm,
                   ImmutableList<Term> paramTerms,
                   java.util.Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres,
                   Services services)
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Returns the measured_by clause of the contract.
        Specified by:
        getMby in interface Contract
        Parameters:
        heapTerms - terms for the heap context
        selfTerm - term of self variable
        paramTerms - terms of parameter variables
        atPres - terms of variables at previous heap
        services - services object
        Returns:
        the measured-by term

        Description copied from interface: Contract

      • toBeSaved

        public boolean toBeSaved()
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Tells whether, on saving a proof where this contract is available, the contract should be saved too. (this is currently true for contracts specified directly in DL, but not for JML contracts)
        Specified by:
        toBeSaved in interface Contract
        Returns:
        see above

      • transactionApplicableContract

        public boolean transactionApplicableContract()
        Specified by:
        transactionApplicableContract in interface Contract

      • proofToString

        public java.lang.String proofToString(Services services)
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Returns a parseable String representation of the contract. Precondition: toBeSaved() must be true.
        Specified by:
        proofToString in interface Contract
        Parameters:
        services - the services instance
        Returns:
        the (parseable) String representation

        Returns:

      • hasSelfVar

        public boolean hasSelfVar()
        Description copied from interface: Contract
        Checks if a self variable is originally provided.
        Specified by:
        hasSelfVar in interface Contract
        Returns:
        true self variable is originally provided, false no self variable available.

      • hasModifiesClause

        public boolean hasModifiesClause(LocationVariable heap)
        Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
        Parameters:
        heap - the heap to use.
        Returns:
        true iff this contract is strictly pure.
        See Also:
        AuxiliaryContract.hasModifiesClause(LocationVariable)

      • setAuxiliaryContract

        protected void setAuxiliaryContract(T contract)

      • getAuxiliaryContract

        public T getAuxiliaryContract()
        Returns:
        the corresponding AuxiliaryContract.

      • getBlock

        public StatementBlock getBlock()
        Returns:
        the block this contract belongs to.
        See Also:
        AuxiliaryContract.getBlock()

      • getMethod

        public IProgramMethod getMethod()
        Returns:
        the method containing getBlock()
        See Also:
        AuxiliaryContract.getMethod()

      • getPlaceholderVariables

        public AuxiliaryContract.Variables getPlaceholderVariables()
        Returns the set of placeholder variables created during this contract's instantiation. These are replaced by the real variables with the same names when the contract is applied.
        Returns:
        the placeholder variables used created during this contracts instantiation.
        See Also:
        AuxiliaryContractBuilders.VariablesCreatorAndRegistrar, AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables()

      • getModality

        public Modality getModality()
        Returns:
        this contract's modality.
        See Also:
        AuxiliaryContract.getModality()
